Product Type: Tape Drive
Vendor ID: 'IBM     '
Product ID: 'ULT3580-TD6     '
Revision: 'G9R1'
Attached Changer API: No
SerialNumber: '1013000123'
TapeAlert[8]:       Not Data Grade: The tape is not data-grade. Any data you back up to the tape is at risk. Replace the cartridge with a data-grade tape.
TapeAlert[20]:      Clean Now: The tape drive needs cleaning NOW.
MinBlock: 1
MaxBlock: 8388608
SCSI ID: 5
SCSI LUN: 0
Ready: yes
BufferedMode: yes
Medium Type: 0x58
Density Code: 0x5a
BlockSize: 0
DataCompEnabled: yes
